name: Nitin Bhatia
bio: India's most followed real estate legal educator. Covers RERA, builder disputes, home loan traps, property registration, and title issues. Known for exposing common frauds buyers face.
relevance_to_kyl: Huge overlap — audience is exactly KYL's target: buyers worried about legal risks in land/property purchase. Could be a distribution partner.
notes: Most credible legal RE creator in India. 1.6M YouTube subscribers as of FY2025.

name: Anuj Puri
bio: Chairman of ANAROCK Property Consultants (India's largest independent residential advisory). Former JLL India Chairman. Weekly market commentary on residential demand, price trends, and policy impact.
relevance_to_kyl: Industry authority voice. His market research overlaps directly with KYL's bottom-up sizing work.
notes: Strongest English-language real estate thought leader in India.

name: Prashant Thakur
bio: Director & Head of Research at ANAROCK. Publishes quarterly residential market reports covering 7 cities — sales volumes, launches, price trends. Data-driven, sourced from primary research.
relevance_to_kyl: Primary source for city-level residential data that KYL references. Collaboration or data-sharing opportunity.
notes: Most cited research head in Indian residential RE. Less consumer-facing, more industry/institutional audience.

name: Pankaj Kapoor
bio: Founder & MD of Liases Foras — India's oldest independent real estate research firm. Regular media commentator on NDTV, ET Now, Bloomberg Quint for residential market data. Provides India's most trusted housing price index.
relevance_to_kyl: Data partner potential — Liases Foras is a primary source for residential absorption data used in KYL's market sizing.
notes: Institutional audience, not consumer. Trusted by MoHUA and NHB for housing statistics.

name: Real Estate Gyaan
bio: Hindi-language real estate investment education channel. Covers plot investment, RERA project checks, home loan calculation, registry process, and land records. Targeted at first-time buyers in Tier-1 and Tier-2 cities.
relevance_to_kyl: Direct audience overlap — covers land/plot investment advice in Hindi, KYL's core use case. High partnership potential for land report awareness.
notes: One of the strongest Hindi-language RE channels with a plot/land focus. Approx. figures.

name: Mumbai Property Exchange
bio: Mumbai-focused real estate channel covering new project reviews, area guides (Thane, Navi Mumbai, Mira Road, Dombivli), and property investment. Bilingual — Hindi and Marathi. Popular with first-time MMR buyers.
relevance_to_kyl: MMR is Maharashtra's highest-value market. Audience buys in areas where land title research is critical (peripheral areas, plotted schemes).
notes: Strong local reach in MMR periphery where plotted developments are active.

name: Bangalore Property Guy
bio: Bengaluru real estate creator covering North Bangalore corridor (Devanahalli, Yelahanka, Hebbal), plotted development reviews, apartment vs. plot comparison, and BBMP/BMRDA approvals.
relevance_to_kyl: Directly in KYL's domain — covers plotted developments and approval status which are core to land due diligence. Kannada-language reach into Bengaluru's largest buyer segment.
notes: Plotted development focus in North Bengaluru is the highest-growth land market in South India.

name: Hyderabad Real Estate Network
bio: Hyderabad-focused real estate content covering HMDA approved layouts, villa plots, open plots in ORR corridor, and RERA project reviews. Telugu-English bilingual, strong Facebook community of 150K+ members.
relevance_to_kyl: Hyderabad open plot market is one of India's most active. This audience directly needs land title research, HMDA approval verification, and encumbrance checks.
notes: Strong Facebook community is key distribution in Telangana. Open plot buyers = prime KYL customers.

name: Pune Property Updates
bio: Pune real estate content focused on new launches, Dhanori-Wagholi-Undri corridors, plotted scheme reviews, and PMRDA vs PCMC jurisdiction confusion for buyers.
relevance_to_kyl: Pune is Maharashtra's second-largest plotted development market after MMR. PMRDA/PCMC confusion is exactly the due diligence gap KYL solves.
notes: Marathi-language reach is crucial for Pune's large local buyer base.

name: Gujarat Property Guide
bio: Gujarati and Hindi real estate content for Ahmedabad, Surat, Rajkot, and Vadodara. Covers RERA Gujarat, NA (non-agricultural) land conversion, plotted schemes, and investment zones around GIFT City.
relevance_to_kyl: Gujarati language dominance. NA land conversion verification is a core KYL use case — buyers need to confirm agricultural land has proper conversion order before purchase.
notes: Gujarat's land market has unique NA-conversion compliance need that KYL can address directly.

name: Delhi NCR Property Talk
bio: Delhi NCR real estate content covering Noida Extension, Yamuna Expressway, Gurgaon sectors, and farmhouse/plot investments on NH-58. Hindi-English bilingual with strong North India audience.
relevance_to_kyl: NCR plot market (Yamuna Expressway, Jewar area) is high-risk for buyers — many scam layouts. KYL's title verification directly addresses this audience's fear.
notes: Yamuna Expressway / Jewar corridor is booming due to airport and F1 track proximity. Land scams are rife — creating strong demand for verification products.

name: NRI Property India
bio: Dedicated to NRI buyers navigating Indian property purchases remotely. Covers FEMA regulations, power of attorney risks, NRI home loans, repatriation of sale proceeds, and trusted agent selection.
relevance_to_kyl: NRIs are the highest-value KYL target — they pay premium for remote verification, can't visit site, need digital land reports. Perfect audience for KYL's full-report product.
notes: NRI audience has highest willingness to pay for land due diligence (remote, high-stakes purchase).

name: Plot Mitra
bio: India's first YouTube channel dedicated exclusively to plot and land investment — covering layout approvals, title checks, NA vs agricultural land, land records (7/12, patta), and return on investment analysis for plots.
relevance_to_kyl: Closest content creator to KYL's exact use case — covers exactly what KYL does (title check, approvals, land records) for the same audience (plot buyers). High partnership priority.
notes: Most aligned creator to KYL's product. Should be a top-priority distribution partner.

name: Ashish Punamia (RERA Expert)
bio: MahaRERA expert and consumer advocate. Covers builder delays, RERA complaints process, OC/CC certificates, and buyer rights under MahaRERA. Marathi and Hindi content with strong Maharashtra audience.
relevance_to_kyl: Covers the post-purchase dispute side; KYL's pre-purchase due diligence is the upstream solution to the problems Ashish helps resolve downstream.
notes: Niche but highly trusted within Maharashtra real estate buyer community.

name: Tamil Real Estate (TRE)
bio: Tamil-language real estate content for Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, and Salem. Covers plot investments, DTCP-approved layouts, patta transfers, and encumbrance certificate process in Tamil Nadu.
relevance_to_kyl: Tamil language is critical for Tamil Nadu — the DTCP layout approval and patta transfer process is exactly what KYL's report covers. Strong regional audience.
notes: Tamil content in real estate is underserved — strong first-mover advantage for KYL in Tamil Nadu partnership.

name: Sana Ram — Home Decor & Property
bio: Instagram-first real estate and home content creator. Covers home buying journey, vastu for home, interior design after possession, and real estate investment for millennials. English-first with Hindi mix. Strong urban millennial audience.
relevance_to_kyl: Urban millennial audience buying first home — often plots in peripheral areas. Vastu + due diligence content resonates. KYL could collaborate on 'before you buy a plot' content.
notes: More lifestyle/aspirational than technical. Large Instagram following. Adjacent audience.

name: Vasant Bhanushali — Surat Property
bio: Surat-focused real estate creator in Gujarati. Covers new textile district projects, Surat Metro impact on property prices, non-agricultural land parcels, and industrial zone investments.
relevance_to_kyl: Surat's fast-growing property market has significant NA land + industrial zone activity. Gujarati-language content reaches a community that transacts heavily in land.
notes: Regional creator — approximate follower data. Gujarat's land market is under-researched.

name: Kolkata Property Zone
bio: Kolkata and West Bengal real estate content in Bengali. Covers New Town Rajarhat, Howrah redevelopment, agricultural land conversion in WB, and registration process in Bengali for local buyers.
relevance_to_kyl: Bengali-language land records and registration content for a state with complex mutation/conversion requirements. Under-served market for KYL.
notes: Facebook-dominant platform in West Bengal. Approximate figures.

name: PropTalks India
bio: English-language real estate investment analysis — covers REITs, commercial RE, emerging micro-markets, and data-driven investment decisions. Strong LinkedIn and Instagram presence among professionals and HNIs.
relevance_to_kyl: Professional/HNI audience that demands data-quality content. KYL's research reports and market sizing data would resonate strongly with this audience.
notes: English-speaking professional audience is KYL's best potential early adopter segment.

name: Jaipur Property Info
bio: Rajasthan real estate content in Hindi. Covers JDA-approved plots, Ajmer Road corridor, Amer area plotted schemes, agricultural to NA land conversion, and JDA auction plots in Jaipur.
relevance_to_kyl: Jaipur's JDA-approved plot market is one of North India's largest. NA conversion and JDA approval verification are KYL's core use cases.
notes: Rajasthan's plotted market is driven by tourism and second-home investment. Approximate figures.
